query:
SELECT u.open_id, u.name, 
       rc.investment_rules,
       rc.task_instruction,
       rc.data_library,
       rc.updated_at
FROM rpa_configs rc
JOIN users u ON u.id = rc.user_id
ORDER BY rc.updated_at DESC
LIMIT 1;
